Tumor/Normal: Indicates if the sample is from tumor or normal tissue.
Age: Age of the patient in years.
BMI: Body Mass Index of the patient.
Ethnicity_Self_Identify: Ethnicity as self-identified by the patient.
Tumor_Site: Primary location of the tumor within the organ.
Tumor_Site_Other: Additional description of the tumor location.
Tumor_Size_cm: Size of the tumor in centimeters.
Tumor_Focality: Describes the tumor's presence as unifocal or multifocal.
Histologic_Type: Identifies the type of renal cell carcinoma, primarily clear cell.
Grade: Indicates the grade of the tumor, ranging from G1 to G4.
Tumor_Stage_Pathological: Represents the stage of cancer progression, from I to IV.
Path_Stage_Primary_Tumor_pT: Describes the extent of the primary tumor.
Path_Stage_Reg_Lymph_Nodes_pN: Indicates the involvement of regional lymph nodes.
